text: 2. **`src/cli/messaging.rs:13-18`** — prints `"sent chat … mentioning session {codename}"` from the RPC's `mentioned_session`. With a pubkey-only mention, `mentioned_session` is `None`, so it silently falls to the plain `"sent chat …"` branch — **functionally safe but loses the confirmation label.** Should print the resolved agent label (e.g. `mentioning @haiku1`) from `mentioned_pubkey` instead. [...] | `src/cli/messaging.rs:17` — `"…mentioning session {}"` | **[USER-FACING]** | agent-instance label of the mentioned session, or raw id if only correlation |
